x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Reservable modules define the types of spaces Now Assist WSD can recommend. Without multiple module types, AI recommendations are limited in variety and cannot match employee preferences for different workspace types.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var ga = new GlideAggregate("sn_wsd_rsv_reservable_module"); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (count >= 3) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: count + " reservable modules configured", finding: count + " reservable modules configured. Now Assist WSD can recommend across multiple space types including desks, meeting rooms, and amenity spaces." }; } else if (count >= 1) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: count + " reservable module(s) configured", finding: "Only " + count + " reservable module(s) configured (target: 3+). Now Assist WSD AI recommendations will be limited to fewer space types." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No reservable modules configured", finding: "No reservable modules configured. Now Assist WSD cannot make AI space recommendations without defined reservable space types." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure reservable modules for each space type (desks, meeting rooms, focus rooms, etc.). Navigate to Workplace Service Delivery > Administration > Reservable Modules.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_9ff89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c64
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Reservable modules define the types of spaces Now Assist WSD can recommend. Without multiple module types, AI recommendations are limited in variety and cannot match employee preferences for different workspace types.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Reservable Module Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var ga = new GlideAggregate("sn_wsd_rsv_reservable_module"); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (count >= 3) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: count + " reservable modules configured", finding: count + " reservable modules configured. Now Assist WSD can recommend across multiple space types including desks, meeting rooms, and amenity spaces." }; } else if (count >= 1) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: count + " reservable module(s) configured", finding: "Only " + count + " reservable module(s) configured (target: 3+). Now Assist WSD AI recommendations will be limited to fewer space types." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No reservable modules configured", finding: "No reservable modules configured. Now Assist WSD cannot make AI space recommendations without defined reservable space types." }; } })]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>WSD</module><number>CHK0000603</number><order>600</order><remediation_guidance>Configure reservable modules for each space type (desks, meeting rooms, focus rooms, etc.). Navigate to Workplace Service Delivery > Administration > Reservable Modules.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:21</sys_created_on><sys_id>9ff89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c64</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Reservable Module Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_9ff89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c64</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
